name: omadia-desktop
description: omadia native desktop installer — runs the full omadia stack locally with an embedded Postgres+pgvector engine, no Docker.

scripts.pack:mac: npm run build && npm run stage && electron-builder --mac --publish never
scripts.pack:win: npm run build && npm run stage && electron-builder --win --publish never
scripts.pack:all: npm run build && npm run stage && electron-builder --mac --win --publish never
